reviews.review_title: I would give a million stars if I could
reviews.review_description:
RE is one of my favorite series ever with RE4 being my fav out of all of them I am begging you to bring more RE games directly to vr because I don’t have a pcvr or PlayStation I can’t play RE7 or 8 but I would love to eventually see most if not all the games come to vr especially the mainstream games PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE IM BEGGING YOU
I WILL SELL MY SOUL FOR THOSE GAMES

*minor spoiler warning* The game is what it says, re4 vr. Which is very fun and has more modern controls on by default which was what helped experience re4 in all its glory. However, it’s a bummer that they cut the separate ways free dlc. I know that they had to tone down some things like inspections or the “overtime” scene at the end. But from what I’ve heard about separate ways, it’s only some snip bits of the main campaign from Ada’s side. So I don’t know why they would have cut it since they have her models and weapons in mercenaries but it’s only a small part and the game has more than enough replay ability like the original that it’s still fine. But my biggest problem is the price, it’s a master piece like the original don’t get me wrong. But whose idea was it to charge $40 for it!? I’d recommend getting it on sale but otherwise just wait.

Look the game is really good and fun but they really need to bring the remake version to met quest. The remake is so much better and the graphics feel annoying at times. And if yall do decide to bring it to meta quest, make the people who bought this game get it for free, because this game is definitely not worth 40$. Maybe 25-30$ seems reasonable but not 40$.

this game gave me shivers up my spine once i started story mode on this game the first cutine already looked pretty fun if you're into scary games like this i recommend buying it. that one character that says, "what ya you buying " i just love his personality and the fact that you can shoot him....... please put more resedent evil games on meta

Why cut separate ways out of all things from the og, the new content on mercenaries is great but not enough to replace Ada's perspective from the main story... if it weren't for that and some dialogue censoring, this version of the game could've easily be top 3 of the best versions of this game.

reviews.review_title: How the f#ck do you beat Ramon Salazar
reviews.review_description:
The game was good until you have the boss fight Ramon Salazar how the f#ck do you beat him it's f#cking impossible for normal it f#cking hard I'm starting to hate the game. F#cking Ramon Salazar his little @ss is the opposite if an giraffe mf can't even touch his hands together even if he's doing jumping jacks can't even raise his hands over his head

(Edit) I beat him with a rocket launcher 5 stars

I’m not even a resident evil fan, I bought this game like 4-5 months ago and still play it a lot this is my favourite story/game in VR, I still watch RE4 videos daily even though I only play the VR version. Great game even mercenaries mode is fun for a few days. Best game for action/horror

I love this game to bits, i had it on the Playstation 2, 4, and now the remake. So imagine how excited i was to find out its available on VR as well. I managed to get halfway through the game, but now, whenever i try to open the game, it never follows through. Im stuck on the loading screen for hours and hours. Im unsure what to do, its been like this for months.

No matter if it’s Re4 on the Quest, Re7 on the Psvr1, or Re8 on the Psvr2 the Resident Evil series is the highest caliber experience you can have. The quality and care for each of its VR ports are unmatched. While the graphics are outdated they still translate surprisingly well and look great. If they released every mainline RE game for VR I would gladly spend moms credit card for them.

I've got to say that getting to play this in VR is AMAZING. Graphics are awesome considering this isn't a new engine reboot. The depth and textures of the environment are stellar. Mechanically speaking, everything is buttery smooth. LOVE the UI from the handling of the weapons to the pause menu and inventory system. Definitely felt like a lot of love went into this port, Glad I purchased.

reviews.review_title: Incredible, best game in VR yet
reviews.review_description: I’m a lifelong Resident Evil fan. When I saw that 4 made it to VR, I knew these were big shoes to fill. Nailed it! It’s fantastic, immersive and true to the original. Amazing!

A precision for those who don't know: this is a ported game which means that you have to accept a 2005 gameplay style with basic actions and simple graphics (2D cutscenes, etc.). Don't expect the quality of the steam version (there are mods however that can improve the quality).

Overall, it is a nice game (not as extraordinary as everyone says) that runs very smoothly and can keep you busy for at least 15-17 hours. When you finish, you can start a new game+ (redo the campaign but with all your gold, weapons and their stats) or replay on a harder level.

The reason that I give 4 stars is more about the high price. I get that it is a big title but there are way better options for less.

I’ve never played any re games but yea this was the first time and now I’m addicted and want to play other ones. The whole story is very good the shooting is fun and just the whole atmosphere is just amazing it just looks cold and scary. Also the monsters are very scary.

reviews.review_title: I love this GAME AND I LOVE THE REMAKEEE
reviews.review_description: I played the remake on Xbox series s and I loved the game, this was my first time playing the original, on top of that, ON VR, and I LOVE IT.

reviews.review_title: Only Game Worth Full Price on Meta Store
reviews.review_description: Wonderful experience. Shame meta shut the studio down. This is the only game I've found on the store (other than maybe Superhot) that is worthy of the full price. Not only does it never seem to go on sale, but it is worth every cent. It feels fantastic in VR despite being a 20 year old game at this point. This has gotta be the best game available on the Meta store. Great story, awesome gameplay, and keeps you engaged and entertained from start to finish. If you're on the fence about getting this game, just do it. You will not regret it.

I love the game however I really hope that there would be a way to make more re vr games like re1, re2 ext…
Obv I know about re7/8 being on vr but I mean for the quest but overall this game is great.

reviews.review_title: One of the Best Re Games in VR?
reviews.review_description:
As someone who just finished playing every single mainline resident evil - old and new - I was really excited to hop into this and it was amazing 
Knowing it was just a port of re4 was fine and I went into it expecting a lot and it exceeded even that. First full vr game I’ve played through on my quest so far and I got a nice 11 hours out of the campaign but also have played this game a few times so a familiar with it all. Highly recommend to anyone interested, even with the $40 price tag

reviews.review_title: Pls make more re games and more games
reviews.review_description: WE NEED A VR GAME WITH EVERY RE GAME PLS MAKE IT YOU WILL MAKE W LOT OF MONEY AND PEOPLE WILL HAVE SO MUCH FUN SO PLS MAKE THEM REMAKES AND ORIGINAL PLS AND OVERALL THIS GAME IT IS SO FUN PLS TRY TO MAKE A SILENT HILL GAME DEADSPACE GAME AND MAKE MORE GAMES
This game is a masterpiece of survival horror VR games, everything is amazing 10/10 🤩

Yes, obviously you can tell it’s older graphics but when in VR, the feel is just different somehow, almost like your mind can let go of reality and still somehow just accept the RE4 world as your current realistic environment.
Again, yes you can tell it’s fake but still, the immersion of vr just hits differently and it’s really
Hard to explain unless you are playing it.

Great game, great controls, and overall I’d give it 10/10!

reviews.review_description: The remake of this would of been amazing and especially others like 7 and village

5/5 would accidentally shoot her again
Re4 in vr is banger! Goated!
It a good game just the mechanics are 1/10 but, its accurate to the console re4 (spoiler alert). But Leon saves Ashley and then they except .

reviews.review_title: The Best Way To Play A Classic.
reviews.review_description:
For a long time Resident Evil fan who played the original on Gamecube and PS2 back in the day, this is simply the best version avaliable.

All the Nostalgia but more immersive and it goes without saying that VR combat is more fun than the old semi-tank controls...

For someone who has no nostalgia it is simply one of the bestshooter/adventure/light horror games avaliable on a standalone device, it is old but it is also Capcom gold.
brilliant liked it more on vr
It makes re4 so much more replay able than it already is and free mode is very fun and allows you to unlock different modes. There’s a lot on here that’s exclusively on the VR version.

There’s no way to use cheats.

I want to use a trainer.

Never got to play this game before vr and kicked off me going back to play the other games after it
Got up to the island part as of writing very fun
Combat is smooth animations are also smooth with no jank really . I’d highly recommend playing this

My one complaint is that grenades tooks me a little while to get used to (kept droping them on myself when trying to put them away on my chest) other than that minor nitpick I’d say the game is fine

I know RE5 is unlikely to get the same treatment, but i'd love it. Playing a Co-op RE would be amazing in VR. And even if not RE5 how about Mercenaries 3D? That game would be perfect for a VR port as it's a natural upgrade to stereoscopic 3D!

An amazing game ported on vr and most of the mechanics are amazing too but only thing I dont like is during the last part on the jet ski it would constantly make me let go of the handle bars and it wouldn't let me steer killing me. Other then that amazing game

Playing this game as a kid it scared the heck out of me and all my friends. As an adult I have my friends, who have never played re4, play it cause it’s the closest I could get to experiencing the game for the first time again. As an adult the graphics and knowing what is gonna happen took that "oh sh*t" feeling away. As SOON as I got into the title screen I was screaming I was so excited. The game play is so immersive and if you loved this game before I can’t even describe what it’s like to feel like you are Leon. A character I absolutely fell in love with.
Before RE4 had rough game mechanics and it was still loved. Now you can aim so fast. Aim while you walk. Grab your guns, meds, knife, and grenades off your body for quick swapping. Words can’t even describe how it feels to live in a game that meant so much growing up. It feels like a dream.
THIS GAME IS AN ABSOLUTE MUST! Especially if you loved RE4 before. You won’t regret it. My only complaint is that they changed dialogue to make the game less offensive. It’s a horror game. And it was humorous smh
where should i start so the game is just perfect the re games where always goated the Atmosphäre is so well made you should give it a try stranger!
Goat flat screen and vr game

reviews.review_title: One of these best games I played!!!!
reviews.review_description: Great scenery, no motion sickness and can be played in sitting mode!

reviews.review_title: The VR set is worth for this game only
reviews.review_description: It's amazing, I finished it several times. Very long story (~10h) and intuitive controls. Some jumpscares and since it is very immersive, it is a bit terrifying at times!
It's one of the best vr games the graphics aren't the best but it's the original not the remake but I gave it 4 stars because it reused so many villagers.
Best game i ever played the story is perfect and  if you are new to vr  this is the perfect game
Proves to make a great VR game all you need to do is adapt a great game for VR

This game is so fun at the start, but then when you start to get to the end of the game, you start running out of ammo, right now I have 0 ammo for all of my guns and I'm in this castle with these mini bosses that take a lot of bullets to kill and I don't think its fun anymore cause I have no ammo so I quit the game, if there were more ammo boxes to find or if the ammo boxes gave you more ammo then I think this game would be really fun but right now I quit cause I can't find any ammo, other than that, the games story is pretty good.

reviews.review_title: One of the Best Horror vr Games EVER!!!!
reviews.review_description: I used to watch my dad play this on the Wii, (used) but he couldn’t with me around anymore because my mom saw him die from the chainsaw dude and got his head chopped off, and I was not allowed to watch or play it anymore😢. Until today! I bought it (because i asked my dad and im old enough!!!) and it is very fun, I love the shotgun, how you have to preserve your ammunition, how the gore is not that bad, and how you have to move your controllers to dodge or run during the game! One thing i love is how you are way faster than on the Wii. This is one if the best horror games, heck even the best vr game i have played! I would HIGHLY recomnd this game if you like: guns, SHOTGUN😁😁😁😁, gernades, not that bad gore, and to play a new and good game!

reviews.review_title: Flashlight doesnt turn on in dark areas
reviews.review_description: After googleing and trying everything i could find and nothing working it appears they forgot to include the flashlight, should had just bought on steam
This game is amazing I'm a big fan of the resident evil games and this game is just amazing. I love resident evil 4 and it is amazing in VR so if you like the resident evil games I would get this :)
Not as good as Elden Ring but still a 11/10

reviews.review_title: PLEASE BRING MORE RE TITLES TO QUEST
reviews.review_description: I knew as soon as I bought my Quest, this would be my first game. Big fan of the series and I must say, this is the BEST experience I’ve ever had playing RE. The immersion is unreal! Tons of replay-ability, too! You have Mercenaries which is a game in itself. Once you beat the game, you unlock new weapons and costumes. Also, a harder difficulty! I truly hope Meta brings more Resident Evil titles. Whether you’ve played the game before or you’re new to RE, this is a MUST BUY. This was my third time playing RE4 and still, it was a brand new experience. 100% worth the money.

reviews.review_title: Why I love resident evil before
reviews.review_description: Absolute amazing game the graphics are pretty good for being 20 years old  and very good story and boss fights, ￼￼￼￼
Holy sh$t this games is awesome recommend

So the graphics are old, character design a bit cheesy, and the voice acting is over the top, BUT the gameplay is a blast.  Taking out legions of zombies/bad guys with an assortment of fun weapons, puzzles that are interesting but not overly difficult, and some minor exploration elements all make for a very engaging experience.  Get it on sale and enjoy!

reviews.review_title: Best Way to play this game
reviews.review_description: It is absolutely incredible. Vr really immerses you as leon and makes the horror of the original game 10x scarier. It's a blast, if you have vr this is a no brainer.

reviews.review_title: Please make more games like this one!
reviews.review_description:
RE4 has been my second ‘all-time favourite’ game since it first came out on PS2. (The first one being Red Dead Redemption 1.) I absolutely loved it in 2005 and went through it all many times. I played the remake on PS5 when it was released and found it fairly ok. I thought buying the original version in VR on my MQ3 would mildly entertain me for a very short period of time. WRONG! It’s simply amazing. The devs did a fantastic job and I can’t believe how fun, immersive and well-designed this game is! I play with the ‘immersive’ mode on and reaching for a specific item and interacting with it feels insanely natural and satisfying. Anyway… Maybe the best gaming experience I’ve ever had! 
PS: The VR version’s easier since you hardly ever miss your targets :D
[After finishing the game: I’ve completed the game in 14h43m and enjoyed every second of it! I’ve tried a few other games on the side and NEVER found such a polished gameplay. Every weapon has its own touch to it and make you actually feel like you’re inside the game. Twenty years apart, two very different approaches but the same incredible fun. 100%!

First, this scared me as a little kid. This was great 9 years later. Long story, great mercenaries missons, best quality ever for an OG game. All this is great and terrifying moments good on bosses and good transitions to different places. Good quality how. Well doors only open forward not backwards to make it scary and more Suspenseful to the next adventure.

reviews.review_title: Love game but not on vr it gliches
reviews.review_description: It glitches
If you love the original you must play this port

reviews.review_title: An Almost Perfect Port of a Masterpiece
reviews.review_description: A phenomenal port of a masterpiece! Resident Evil 4 is a fantastic game, and Armature absolutely put in the work to make it look and play well in VR. Cutscenes and certain interactions do still play in 3rd-person, but most of the game now plays in first-person, with all guns featuring manual reloading. The only major downside to this version is the omission of Separate Ways, the additional campaign starring Ada Wong included in almost every other version of the game. That omission is the only thing stopping me from giving this version give stars.

Had fun with this, but a few things took me out of the VR experience. Biggest one: the game switches to 2D mode, not just for cut-scenes, but even mid-battle (very off-putting)! Going through the menu to switch weapons mid-battle. Limitations that make no sense, ie. you can't step over a broken step but you can climb the wall to bring you to the top of those same steps. Gun vendor doesn't sell ammo (you could use resources upgrading a weapon and then not find any bullets for it or worse end up with zero bullets).

Out of all of my games( Batman , Ironman, Red Matter 1&2 and many others) this is still one of my favorites! Could the graphics by better and the cutscenes be cut out, Yes…. But the overall experience is Great! This is my 3rd play through and I still enjoy it.

From OVERHAULED visuals like: all ORIGINAL EFFECTS restored, materials more metallic and/or shiny, etc!

To full Campaign Overhauls too! For items, triggers/progression, and ENEMIES!

The VR version is now even better and timeless, thanks to all the mods!

Definitive Edition / Life in Hell VR / Rising of Evil VR:
ALL MODS AVAILABLE on NEXUS now!

With many more fun mods and skins in the RE4 VR - MOD PACK on Nexus too!

and the VR Randomizer by re_duke on ModDB, with a new even better VR Randomizer version in the works!
Overall fun immersive game

reviews.review_title: ONE OF THE BEST RE EXPERIENCES
reviews.review_description: Re 4 in vr is awesome, I haven’t played on console or anything else but this is the way to play! It’s so immersive and fun you have to play it

reviews.review_title: Do not sell your quest 2 before you play
reviews.review_description: This game is the best game on quest 2 and it has hundreds of hours of content if you unlock every weapon and outfit. Its also not clunky like other games are, and its re4 and you cant go wrong with re4. This version is way easier though which is probably good cause its in vr and it wouldnt be fun if it was hard.
By far the greatest VR experience you can have

reviews.review_title: This terrible game cheeses you out
reviews.review_description: So I had just beated the spot with Luis protecting Ashley, I was going to get the ammo the enemies dropped, I noticed I was walking very slowly so I reloaded the game, then also the ammo disappeared, when I reload again it stayed gone, this is a terrible game like it was the game’s fault for lacking and it is punishing the player for their own fault. Would not but it again!
Can use more grafics but other than that bring yes more re games
Good

Love every aspect of this game from start to finish. I had to play it three times cuz it's so good. I'm a 40yo grown man, and I was having nightmares like I was 10yo and the OG R.E. Just dropped and I'm playing it for the 1st time. 

Please put that new R.E. 9 on VR. That game would be amazing on this platform. I don't wanna play another R.E. game on a console. This is the true way to experience the terror!

Played this game through on console and PC but now on the Quest 3, it's by far the best version. Always dreamed as a kid watching Nightmare on TV and wanted to wear that helmet and go on a fantasy journey to another reality and now I can. Brilliant from start to finish, loved every minute. I just hope there's more vr remakes from the franchise, fantastic crossover. This and Half life Alex are superb. This game puts you into the action and is worth buying a headset just to experience one of the best resident evil games to date! 5 out of 5....
“Guess there’s no sex discrimination here.”—Leon Kennedy (2005)
They were way too evil￼

reviews.review_title: Made me play my VR again
reviews.review_description: I really wish there were more fully fledged ports like this on the quest

This game when I played was awesome the fact it was so interactive was my favorite thing 

Definitely worth every penny
A must have!

This was an amazing experience and a fantastic port of an all time classic flatscreen game into vr. Sadly the developer Armature has been closed so Meta can better pivot to ai and wearables. Sigh. For me vr has only ever been about the games. Not Horizon’s “social metaverse”, not Coldplay concerts where Chris Martin is being drowned out by squeakers, just games. So if you’re looking for a good sized campaign and a fun throwback to a classic, do yourself a favor and jump right in. While you’re at it feel a little robbed that we never got to have another vr port/ game from Armature.

reviews.review_title: SO MUCH FUN AND TOTALLY WORTH THE PRICE
reviews.review_description:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Absolutely Incredible VR Experience

I love this game so much I genuinely can’t stop playing it. The mechanics are amazing and everything feels so smooth and incredibly well-designed. Every time I put on the headset, I’m totally immersed like I’m actually inside the world.

I’ve played the recent Resident Evil games on console, and I honestly don’t know how I’ll ever go back after experiencing Resident Evil first-hand in VR. The atmosphere, the tension, and the way every encounter pulls you in is on a completely different level.

Resident Evil in VR is the most immersive version of the franchise I’ve ever experienced, and it keeps me coming back for “one more” session that always turns into hours. If you’re a fan of the series or just want a truly next-level VR game, this is an absolute must-play.

i was starting to get discouraged from my quest three because most of the games our kind of cheesy but resident evil brought it back home for me hopefully they will bring more games like this on board! 10/10 must have!!!
